// src/usePrefetchInfiniteQuery.tsx import { useQueryClient } from "./QueryClientProvider.js"; function usePrefetchInfiniteQuery(options, queryClient) { const client = useQueryClient(queryClient); if (!client.getQueryState(options.queryKey)) { client.prefetchInfiniteQuery(options); } } export { usePrefetchInfiniteQuery }; //# sourceMappingURL=usePrefetchInfiniteQuery.js.map
